description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, build-others and test using various internal Docker images from docker.aix.systerel.fr. In the build stage add a build-linux job that runs './build.sh && cd $BUILD_DIR || exit 1' with the c838/build image, sets BUILD_DIR=build and publishes the build/ directory and log files as a weekly artifact. In the build-others stage add jobs for cross‑compilation: build-freertos runs two sample build scripts for NUCLEO‑H723ZG and checks for the generated ELF files; build-fuzz reuses the same build script but only runs when $TEST_NETWORK_FUZZ is set and keeps logs and fuzz binaries for 30 days; build-linux-faulty-packet runs the same script with BUILD_DIR=build_faulty and custom CMAKE_C_FLAGS, publishing its logs and faulty binaries; build-linux64-ASan, build-linux64-NoASan-NoPyS2OPC, build-linux64-pys2opc and build-linux64-static-conf each run the shared build script with different variable flags (ASAN, UBsan, WITH_PYS2OPC, PUBSUB_STATIC_CONFIG) and always archive the build output. Also in build-others add platform‑specific jobs: build-pikeos uses the pikeos image with a custom build script and the pikeos tag; build-rpi uses the rpi-build image, activates a cross‑venv and runs the same build script with a Raspberry‑Pi toolchain; build-win32 and build-win64 use the mingw_build image, set WITH_PYS2OPC=OFF, run the build script and archive the resulting binaries; build-zephyr uses the zephyr_build image to symlink the source and invoke multiple Zephyr sample build scripts for various boards. In the test stage add test-uactt that sets ulimit, runs the acceptance test launcher, and archives TAP logs, logs and coverage files; and test-unit that sources ./.set-bin-root.sh, runs './test-all.sh' and archives test results and coverage data. All jobs define appropriate artifact names, expiration, and rules that trigger on merge requests, tags, or specific environment variables, and the pipeline defines shared variables for build configuration such as S2OPC_EVENT_MANAGEMENT, WITH_CONST_ADDSPACE, and others.
